name: add-endpoint
description: Add a new API endpoint (handler + route + DTO + optional frontend client). Stack-agnostic.

files.hint: Handler/controller method (Express route / .NET Controller action / FastAPI route / Spring @RequestMapping — match project convention)
Request DTO + Response DTO (validate via Zod/FluentValidation/Pydantic/Bean Validation — match project convention)
Service/use-case: add business logic method called by handler
Route registration: wire handler into router/app (only if framework requires explicit registration)
Frontend (only if consumed): typed API client function + hook/store integration

checklist: Decide HTTP method (GET/POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE) + path + auth requirement
Define request shape (params, query, body) and response shape
Implement handler delegating to service layer
Implement service method with business logic + persistence
Add error handling (404 for not found, 409 for conflict, 500 last resort)
Write integration test or contract test
If frontend consumes: add typed client + update hook/store + add tests
